^4 = FILE: BLUS30490SYSTEM\SYS.DAT
+9999 Money
%Credits: zeick
$search 0x00000003000000030000000300000000000000
$write next (48):270F

%Credits: zeick
$search 0x00000003000000030000000300000000000000
$write next (53):05

%Credits: zeick
$search 0x00000003000000030000000300000000000000
$write next (50):63

$write next (51):63

$search 0x00000003000000030000000300000000000000
$write next (24):0000
